description_long: This is a mid-sized, twin-propeller passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a classic, retro livery featuring a combination of white, gray, blue, and red stripes. The aircraft has a low-wing configuration with straight wings and two engines mounted under each wing, each equipped with visible propellers. The tail section is conventional, with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring multiple windows for pilot visibility, and the passenger windows are evenly spaced along the length of the fuselage. The landing gear is visible and appears to be of the tricycle type, with a nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The overall design suggests a classic regional or commuter airliner suitable for short to medium-haul flights.
description: A classic twin-propeller passenger airplane with a low-wing, straight-wing design, retro livery, and tricycle landing gear. Features a streamlined fuselage, conventional tail, and forward cockpit with multiple windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, wing placement, propellers, and the retro livery with visible passenger windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit windows, propellers, and the symmetrical wing and engine arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the tail, wing, and engine configuration, as well as the passenger windows and livery details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the trailing edges of the wings and engines.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin turboprop engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main gear units under the wings.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
